claims.statement: The v1.8.1 baseline contains 22 focused sub-skills, 11 agent prompts, and dedicated skill surfaces for eight named advertising platforms.
Claude Ads v2 targets first-class contracts for twelve named advertising platforms and cross-platform paid-media workflows.
claims.scope: v2 product decision, not a current capability claim

claims.statement: Claude Ads v2 is read-only by default and requires capability-specific approval and rollback controls before any account write.

The v2 instruction architecture uses original clean-room implementations of explicit checklists, effort calibration, examples, repeated safety constraints, instruction precedence, and artifact-backed verification.
The v2 control plane adopts source, capability, maturity, orchestration, and release-gate patterns through original domain-specific contracts.
